children.text: the terms defined in have, respectively, the definitions given such terms in that section;section 2510 of this title
the term “remote computing service” means the provision to the public of computer storage or processing services by means of an electronic communications system;

children.label: i
children.text: has jurisdiction over the offense being investigated;

children.label: ii
children.text: is in or for a district in which the provider of a wire or electronic communication service is located or in which the wire or electronic communications, records, or other information are stored; or

children.label: iii
children.text: is acting on a request for foreign assistance pursuant to ;section 3512 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a court of general criminal jurisdiction of a State authorized by the law of that State to issue search warrants; or

children.label: C
children.text: a court-martial or other proceeding under chapter 47 of title 10 (the Uniform Code of Military Justice) to which a military judge has been detailed; and
the term “governmental entity” means a department or agency of the United States or any State or political subdivision thereof.
